title: Fractional Fermi Sea As Occupancy-Rule And Nonequilibrium-State Comparator

internal_source.source: RECENT_QUANTUM_EVIDENCE_INTAKE_PASS.json; FLCR-34; FLCR-36; FLCR-37; D-drive source-gap queue
internal_source.finding: The corpus needs physical comparators for fractional occupancy, stable excited states, state preparation cycles, and non-classical critical phases.

external_publication.title: Exotic Critical States as Fractional Fermi Seas in the One-Dimensional Bose Gas

faces.correlation: The paper supplies a peer-reviewed comparator for reduced occupancy in a driven one-dimensional quantum system. In the FLCR suite this becomes a test target for claims about slot occupancy, fractional carrier filling, nonequilibrium preparation cycles, and stable excited-state readouts.
crystal_faces: occupancy face: fractional filling vs binary/slot occupancy
preparation face: cyclic interaction changes vs staged state transition
stability face: excited yet ordered state vs recursive fold stability
comparator face: generalized hydrodynamics and correlation functions vs TarPit/bondedness readout
obligations: Define the FLCR observable corresponding to fractional occupancy without changing the PRL paper's variables.
Add unit-bearing comparator rows for momentum distribution, correlation functions, and preparation-cycle parameters.
Run TarPit/crystal comparison on an encoded fractional-occupancy toy state before any literal physics promotion.
Route any stronger claim to FLCR-41..80 with external equations and residuals.

validation_review.next_action: Attach package to routed papers, then convert obligations into paper-local claim rows and workbook exercises.
